# Amascut 1000% Ranged-Melee (Hybrid DPS) <:range:580168050121113623> <:melee:1096130867279171706>
.img:https://img.pvme.io/images/EFlnaJbrvr.png
*Note: a **Table of Contents** can be found in the pins.*

.
## __Introduction__
.tag:intro
This is an **advanced guide** which assumes a strong underlying knowledge of all mechanics and information presented in <#1402008762579026015> and <#1402373065152659497>.

.
## __Preset Suggestions__
.tag:preset
⬥ [Ranged-Melee Preset Example](https://presets.pvme.io?id=c2f67128-1241-4ffc-8c6c-fbcb69e2dc86)
.

.
## __Rotations__
.tag:rotation
### __Wars__
s<:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:deadshot:1478061860371828929>

### __Phase 1__
r<:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> + <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → (<:blackstonearrow:785031580149743617>) <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → (<:fularrow:971025696958853180>) after 3 hits → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:dbow:643848618553507843> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:shadowtend:642713547142332416> → <:grico:787904334812807238> + <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538> →  <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> →  <:berserk:535532854004678657> → (tc <:gorillaakh:1004107294084182017>)

*Note: if 6750k by 30 seconds do <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498>  + <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → (<:anti:535541306475151390>) → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → (tc <:gorillaakh:1004107294084182017>)*

.
### __Phase 2 and 3__
(tc <:gorillaakh:1004107294084182017>) + <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:punish:535532879439069184>
(tc <:imperialwarriorakh:1004107288933572608>) + <:freedom:535541258240786434> + <:powerburstofvitality:654618235097972737> → <:barge:535532853916860437> → <:bloodlust:1478080383554945044> <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:rend:1478166426190741584>
Middle chain: <:overpower:535532879334080517>
Side chain: <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:grico:787904334812807238>

*Note: fast (tc <:imperialwarriorakh:1004107288933572608>) + → <:powerburstofvitality:654618235097972737> + <:surge:535533810004262912> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:bloodlust:1478080383554945044> <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:rend:1478166426190741584>*

*Out Role:* (tc <:modestcrocodile:1497224428101173489>) + <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> + <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → *Build to 100%*
*In Role:* (tc <:modestcrocodile:1497224428101173489>) + <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → (tc <:amascuthead:1400943309576470589>) + <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → *Build to 100%*

.
**Amascut**
<:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> + <:fularrow:971025696958853180> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:shadowtend:642713547142332416> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → s<:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> *Don't let this hit* → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → (<:barge:535532853916860437> → <:bloodlust:1478080383554945044> <:gflurry:535532879283879977>) → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:bloodlust:1478080383554945044> <:cane:535532878969438210> → (<:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:punish:535532879439069184>)

*Notes:*
⬥ *If close to cap skip <:barge:535532853916860437> → <:bloodlust:1478080383554945044> <:gflurry:535532879283879977>*
⬥ <:scarabakh:1004107290745524224> mostly skipped: <:backhand:535532854302605333> / <:bindingshot:535541306563231790>
⬥ <:scarabakh:1004107290745524224> not skipped: build to <:cade:535541306353778689>

.
### __Phase 4__
*In Role throw <:scarabakh:1004107290745524224> into portal, Out Role throw <:scarabakh:1004107290745524224> onto <:gorillaakh:1004107294084182017>*
*Bend the knee skip*
<:berserk:535532854004678657> <:barge:535532853916860437> (tc <:scarabakh:1004107290745524224>) + *throw* → bleed <:gflurry:535532879283879977> on <:gorillaakh:1004107294084182017>  →  <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:punish:535532879439069184> → *Inside for In Role*
*Out Role kill 1 more <:scarabakh:1004107290745524224> and throw into portal and go inside*
<:melee:1096130867279171706> <:berserk:535532854004678657> (tc <:imperialwarriorakh:1004107288933572608>) + <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:bloodlust:1478080383554945044> <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:punish:535532879439069184>
<:range:580168050121113623> (tc <:imperialwarriorakh:1004107288933572608>) + <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> + <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566>
Side Chain:  <:deadshot:1478061860371828929>
Middle Chain: <:dbow:643848618553507843> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>

*Note: If <:berserk:535532854004678657> runs out before you can (tc <:imperialwarriorakh:1004107288933572608>) do <:range:580168050121113623>*
*4 GCD (tc <:imperialwarriorakh:1004107288933572608>) + <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> + <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:snipe:1478061857486143498>*

.
**Amascut**
<:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:divert:787904334377648130> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:barge:535532853916860437> → <:consecratedkeris:1334318846202478615> <:overpower:535532879334080517>  → <:bloodlust:1478080383554945044> <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:rend:1478166426190741584> → <:punish:535532879439069184>

*Note: you can cut the assaults short for <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> depends on expected phase timing of your team, end on over half adren.*
### __Phase 5__
Around the time both solo charges are done and both middle fragments are at 50%, prepare with: <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657>
As <:tumekensfragment:1497247315835224116> reforms, move to <:tumekensfragment:1497247315835224116> wait till jumps start as she speaks 'GET OUT OF MY WAY' maintain <:amascuthead:1400943309576470589> as a target and → <:cane:535532878969438210>  →  <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:cane:535532878969438210> / <:varanussmercy:1448697873603498045> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>

[No Dogs Meteor](<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HVOiOaZILjM>)
[Hurricane Example](<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tlBRaYAOglM>)

.
### __Phase 6__
<:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:anti:535541306475151390> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:barge:535532853916860437> → <:bloodlust:1478080383554945044> <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:bloodlust:1478080383554945044> <:cane:535532878969438210> → *First green orbs* <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:piercingshot:1478061863723073636> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> + <:fularrow:971025696958853180> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> (+ <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538>) → *As her second arm stops moving*  <:snipe:1478061857486143498> + <:powerburstofvitality:654618235097972737> → <:dbow:643848618553507843> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → (<:dbow:643848618553507843> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099>) → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:dbow:643848618553507843> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:dbow:643848618553507843> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> *before phase*
.
Jump → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:adaptivestrike:1478062906057949417> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:pulverise:535532879053062146> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → *Click* <:tumekensfragment:1497247315835224116> → *Down*
(tc <:amascuthead:1400943309576470589>) + <:imbueshadows:1478061866193518744> → <:deathsporearrows:900758234527301642> <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:gdeathsswift:994644354536837121> → <:decimation:643848618477879328> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> → <:bolg:994189289623662702> <:spec:537340400273195028> → <:ecb:615618531937222657> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:galeshot:1478061864943616122> → <:rapid:535541270521708566> → <:deadshot:1478061860371828929> → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:grico:787904334812807238> → <:snapshot:1478061855732666439> (+ <:adrenrenewal:736298121704767538>) → <:gloomfirebow:1446178203608809472> <:eofspec:1257438999794946099> → <:meteorstrike:1478070401702821938> *before phase*

[Range Clones example](<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pH03584Djk8>)

.
### __Phase 7__
<:barge:535532853916860437> → <:berserk:535532854004678657> → <:assault:535532855191928842> → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → <:gfury:535532879334080527> → <:cane:535532878969438210> → <:punish:535532879439069184> → <:assault:535532855191928842> (3tick) → <:overpower:535532879334080517> → *If not Scarabus* <:chaosroar:1478062908767211640> (<:voke:535541259465392143> *Mid GCD*) → <:ezk:903244090953588787> <:spec:537340400273195028>

[Loseless Voke P7](<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_b_eeze4XJ4>)

.
